items.title: Patrick Mahomes: Chiefs add two years to contract
items.body_text: Mahomes (ACL) and Kansas City agreed to terms Wednesday on a deal that amends two additional years to his contract, Adam Schefter of ESPN reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Jacoby Brissett: Coach won't name starting QB
items.body_text: Cardinals head coach Mike LaFleur declined Wednesday to name a starting quarterback, though Brissett reported for the start of mandatory minicamp on Monday, Bo Brack of GoPHNX.com reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Alec Pierce: Discusses ankle surgery
items.body_text: Pierce (ankle) revealed Wednesday that he underwent surgery this spring after not getting the results he wanted from a platelet-rich plasma (PRP) injection at the start of the offseason, JJ Stankevitz of Colts.com reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Tetairoa McMillan: On track for training camp
items.body_text: The Panthers expect McMillan (ankle) to be ready for the start of training camp, Mike Kaye of The Charlotte Observer reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Tucker Kraft: Expects to play Week 1
items.body_text: Kraft (knee) said Wednesday that he expects to play Week 1 without any playing-time restrictions, Matt Schneidman of The Athletic reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.
